// Test data for development and debugging
export const MOCK_SHOPS = [
    {
        id: "shop_1",
        name: "Ahmed Local Collections",

        owner_email: "ahmed@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Ahmedabad",
        specialty: "Traditional Wear",
        description: "Authentic Gujarati traditional attire and modern fusion designs",
        image_url: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x300?text=Ahmed+Collections",
        instagram_url: "@ahmedcollections",
        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_2",
        name: "Mumbai Heritage",
        owner_name: "Priya Sharma",
        owner_email: "priya@shoplivebharat.com",
        city: "Mumbai",
        specialty: "Designer Sarees",
        description: "Premium designer sarees and contemporary Indian wear",
        image_url: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x300?text=Mumbai+Heritage",

        is_active: true
    },
    {
        id: "shop_3",
        name: "Delhi Couture",

];
